title: pelargonium × malacophyllon
intro: Pelargonium × malacophyllon, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of pelargonium plants that are commonly used in herbal medicine. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which are derived from its essential oil. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include relief from anxiety and stress, improved sleep quality, and reduced inflammation, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include essential oil, teas, and tinctures, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare, and as a natural remedy for digestive issues and other health concerns.
